error_signature: Split node has nothing to split
title: Split node stopping workflow due to no data
symptom: The workflow stops executing when the Split node has no data to process, leading to fewer loop iterations than expected.
root_cause: The Split node is designed to stop the workflow if there are no items to process. This can lead to fewer iterations in a loop if the Split node does not output any data, causing subsequent nodes to not execute.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the Split node
Test the workflow again with the loop
agent_instruction: Enable 'Always Output Data' in the Split node settings to prevent workflow stoppage.
